title: Participating Institutes in JAC Delhi Counselling 2026

detail.title: Participating Institutes in JAC Delhi Counselling 2026
detail.short_info: JAC Delhi Counselling 2026 registration starts on May 28, 2026. Check complete details on important dates, eligibility, application fee, participating institutes (NSUT, DTU, IGDTUW, IIIT-D, DSEU) and how to apply online at jacdelhi.admissions.nic.in for B.Tech and B.Arch admissions.

content.text: JAC Delhi Counselling 2026 registration and choice filling will commence on May 28, 2026 (Thursday) from 10:00 AM. The last date for online registration, fee payment, and choice filling is June 09, 2026 (Tuesday) till 11:30 PM. This centralized counselling process, conducted by the Joint Admission Committee (JAC) Delhi, facilitates admissions to B.Tech. and B.Arch. programmes in premier Delhi government institutions for the academic session 2026-27.

sections.heading: Participating Institutes in JAC Delhi Counselling 2026

content.text: Here is the list of participating universities/institutes:

items: Netaji Subhas University of Technology (NSUT)
Delhi Technological University (DTU)
Indira Gandhi Delhi Technical University for Women (IGDTUW)
Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology Delhi (IIIT-D)
Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University (DSEU)

content.text: Important Link: Official Admission Notice PDF

rows: Commencement of Online Registration and Choice Filling
Last Date for Online Registration, Fee Payment and Choice Filling

content.text: Candidates are advised to regularly visit the official JAC Delhi portal for further rounds, seat allotment, and counselling schedule updates.

sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for JAC Delhi Counselling 2026

content.text: To participate in JAC Delhi Counselling 2026, candidates must:

items: Have appeared and secured a valid rank in JEE Main 2026 (Paper 1 for B.Tech/B.E., Paper 2 for B.Arch.).
Have passed Class 12 or equivalent examination with a minimum of 60% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM).
Meet the domicile requirements — 85% seats are reserved for Delhi region candidates, while 15% are for Outside Delhi candidates.
Fulfill institute-specific eligibility as detailed in the official brochure.
Visit the official portal: jacdelhi.admissions.nic.in
Register online as per the instructions in the Admission Brochure.
Pay the non-refundable registration fee of Rs. 1500/- online via Credit/Debit Card, Net Banking, UPI, or other available modes.
Fill in choices for programmes and institutes.

content.text: Note: Applications without the prescribed fee will be rejected.

sections.heading: How to Apply for JAC Delhi Counselling 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Step 1: Visit jacdelhi.admissions.nic.in
Step 2: Complete online registration with valid details.
Step 3: Pay Rs. 1500 registration fee.
Step 4: Fill and lock your choices/preferences.
Step 5: Download and keep a printout for future reference.

content.text: For detailed seat matrix, reservation policy (including category-wise and Delhi/Outside Delhi quota), and admission guidelines, candidates should refer to the official Admission Brochure available on the JAC Delhi portal.
